reasoning: The PCI DSS control 4.1.2 focuses on ensuring secure transmission of data over networks, which includes using strong encryption protocols such as TLS. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that Ingress resources use TLS for secure communication, enabling mutual TLS in service meshes for secure service-to-service communication, securing the API server with TLS, and ensuring etcd communication is encrypted with TLS.
title: Requirement 4.1.2
